slides.slide: Overview
slides.narration: Let's begin with an overview of the automated test run. Automated testing for https://beta.solwerindia.com/ The analysis was performed on Total Pages Scanned: 17, giving us a comprehensive view of the site's current state.

slides.slide: Coverage
slides.narration: Now let's move to our page coverage. The discovery agent mapped 5 pages across the site, extracting buttons, headings, and key UI elements from each page for in-depth analysis.

slides.slide: Integrations & Forms
slides.narration: Finally, let's review integrations and forms detected. We identified forms with inputs detected: 9 across the site, along with embedded iframes and third-party scripts such as reCAPTCHA and analytics tools.

slides.slide: Test Results
slides.narration: Finally, let's review our test results. Total Tests: 45. Passed: 41. Failed: 4. Pass Rate: 91.1%. Some tests failed — please review.

slides.slide: Failures
slides.narration:
Finally, let's review the critical failures identified during testing. https://beta.solwerindia.com/: Home Flow: Play video - No YouTube iframe found. https://beta.solwerindia.com/: Home Flow: Section: Recent Blogs - locator.scrollIntoViewIfNeeded: Timeout 25000ms exceeded.
Call log:
[2m  - waiting for getByText('Recent Blogs').first()[22m
. https://beta.solwerindia.com/: Home Flow: Action: View all blogs - Element not found. These issues need immediate attention before deployment.

slides.slide: Visual Captures
slides.narration: Finally, let's review the visual captures taken by the Media Agent. Full-page screenshots were recorded for each page crawled, allowing for visual regression comparison in future runs.
